Home / Fortnite / Cosmetics / Pickaxes / Pickaxes

Pickaxes

Overview

This article is about Pickaxes as a Cosmetic Item. For the Pickaxe used as a weapon, see Pickaxe (Weapon). For the Loading Screen, see Harvesting Tools (Loading Screen).
As of May 26th 2026, there are around 2,169[1] Pickaxes In-Game

Pickaxes (formerly Harvesting Tools) are tools used for gathering resources in Fortnite. They can be used in Battle Royale, Save the World and Creative Experiences. Your equipped cosmetic Pickaxe will be used as a weapon.

Additional features available for Pickaxes

Additional features available for Pickaxes[]
Selectable Styles Reactive Built-In
  • Skull Sickle was the first Pickaxe with styles.
  • Candy Axe was the first reactive Pickaxe.
  • Leviathan Axe was the first Pickaxe with a built-in feature.
Types of Pickaxes

Types of Pickaxes[]
Classic Dual-Wield Spinner Single-Hand Fist
Switching Claw Sword Dual Flail Bat
Staff Spear Single-Wield Dual Spinner Flail

Some of these animations can be slightly altered for a few Pickaxes, but not enough to be considered brand new or unique.
